name: Tabs
description: Tabs facilitates seamless switching between different views.

props.name: lazy
props.description: When enabled, hidden tabs are not rendered at all. Defaults to false that hides tabs with css.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: When specified, enables horizontal and/or vertical scrolling.

props.name: showNavigators
props.description: Whether to display navigation buttons in container when scrollable is enabled.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the element in tabbing order.

props.name: selectOnFocus
props.description: When enabled, the focused tab is activated.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot to detect TabPanel components.

slots.name: previcon
slots.description: Previous button icon template for the scrollable component.

slots.name: nexticon
slots.description: Next button icon template for the scrollable component.
